message:
Apply three Tier-S alien-graveyard optimization levers (Round 3)

AG-02 (EV=45.0): Borrowed-key HashMap in fp-join::join_series
  - HashMap<IndexLabel, Vec<usize>> → HashMap<&IndexLabel, Vec<usize>>
  - Eliminates all right-index label clones during join build phase
  - Mirrors proven Round 2 pattern from fp-index::align_union

AG-03 (EV=45.0): Identity-cast skip via cast_scalar_owned in fp-types
  - New cast_scalar_owned takes Scalar by value, returns unchanged
    when source dtype already matches target dtype
  - fp-columnar::Column::new now uses owned-value path, avoiding
    redundant clone+collect for homogeneous-dtype columns

AG-05 (EV=24.0): Pre-computed N-way union index in DataFrame::from_series
  - Phase 1: compute global union index across all input series
  - Phase 2: reindex each column exactly once against final union
  - Eliminates O(N²×M) iterative realignment → O(N×M)

Isomorphism proof: all 50 workspace tests pass, all 5 conformance
packet gates green, clippy clean, fmt clean. No behavioral change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
